channel.title: Capital Region Handyman
channel.description: Recent content on Capital Region Handyman

item.title: Drywall Repair: When to Fix It and Why DIY Usually Makes It Worse
item.description:
Every house has drywall damage. It is one of the most common repair requests we get, and one of the most common DIY disasters we fix afterward. Whether it is a small nail hole or a crack that keeps coming back no matter how many times you spackle over it, drywall issues are worth getting right the first time.

What Drywall Repair Actually Includes

Drywall repair is not just smearing some compound over a hole and calling it done. Depending on the damage, a proper repair involves several steps.

item.title: Interior and Exterior Painting: What a Handyman Paint Job Actually Looks Like
item.description:
Not every painting project requires a full painting crew, scaffolding, and a week-long production. Sometimes you just need one room freshened up, a hallway touched up, or the front door and trim repainted before they peel any further. That is exactly the kind of work we handle.

What Our Painting Service Includes

We cover both interior and exterior painting projects at the scale most homeowners actually need.

Interior painting includes single rooms, accent walls, hallways, stairwells, ceilings, doors, trim, baseboards, and cabinets. We handle all the prep work, which is where most of the quality comes from. That means filling nail holes, sanding rough spots, caulking gaps between trim and walls, taping edges, and laying drop cloths before any paint goes on.

item.title: Capital Region Handyman
item.description: Locally owned and operated in the Capital Region of New York. We help homeowners tackle their repair lists with honest work, fair prices, and zero runaround.
